feedback.text: Good evening. I've read through the proposed act and agree with its contents. However, I would like to add that it would be important to add a clause regarding the "sale" of software (be it for productivity or entertainment/gaming) without explicit mention of any end of life plans. This has resulted in the situation of consumers paying for software, only to have the software be labeled "end of life" within a short period. This is misleading and anti-consumer behaviour, which the Digital Fairness Act means to combat. Thank you for your time.
